American Ultra (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $14,439,985Details
International Box Office $15,855,043
Worldwide Box Office $30,295,028
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $461,815
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $464,357
Total $926,172
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A stoner and his girlfriend's sleepy, small-town existence is disrupted when his past comes back to haunt him in the form of a government operation set to wipe him out.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,454,284 (37.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.65 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$28,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,778 opening theaters/2,778 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $20,486,619

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 21st, 2015 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: August 19th, 2015 (Wide) (Belgium)
August 19th, 2015 (Wide) (France)
August 21st, 2015 (Wide) (Bulgaria)
August 27th, 2015 (Wide) (South Korea)
August 27th, 2015 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
Video Release: November 10th, 2015 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence, language throughout, drug use and some sexual content.
(Rating bulletin 2380, 7/1/2015)
Running Time: 96 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Intertitle, Scene in End Credits, Voiceover/Narration
Geographical setting: West Virgina
Plot point: Anxiety and Phobias, C.I.A., False Identity, Faulty Memory, Marriage Proposal, Mental Illness, Non-Chronological, Rogue Agent, Romance, Secret Agent, Sleeper Agent, Surprise Twist
Subgenre: Stoner Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Black Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: PalmStar Media, The Bridge Finace Company, Circle of Confusion, Likely Story, Merced Media Partners, PalmStar Media Capital, FilmNation Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
